description: NodeBench Storyboard Bible v1 — 10 boards x 6 frames x 5 annotations. Machine-readable acceptance contract for founder-core UI verification.

frames.uiState: Empty Ask surface with input bar, quick action chips, voice CTA, and 'Run Live Demo' button visible above the fold
frames.userEmotion: Curious but skeptical — what does this do?
frames.requiredData: Quick action chips (weekly reset, investigate company, pre-delegation), MCP install command
frames.transitionTrigger: User types a query or clicks a quick action chip

frames.uiState: Search input has text, loading skeleton appears in result area, trace bar shows 'classify_query' step
frames.userEmotion: Anticipation — will this actually know something useful?
frames.requiredData: Query text, initial trace step
frames.transitionTrigger: First search results begin streaming

frames.uiState: Result workspace renders with entity card, signals, risks, changes, role lens applied, sources bar shows web URLs
frames.userEmotion: Surprise — this is more structured than expected
frames.keyCopy: Entity name + role lens label + signal count
frames.requiredData: Enriched entity data, web search snippets, structured signals, grounding metadata
frames.transitionTrigger: User scrolls result or clicks a signal for detail

frames.uiState: User sees actionable next steps in result, trace shows full pipeline (classify → context → search → extract → assemble)
frames.userEmotion: Agency — I can act on this
frames.keyCopy: Next steps section with specific actions
frames.requiredData: Next steps array, full trace, confidence score
frames.transitionTrigger: User clicks 'Ask NodeBench' to start a conversation or clicks a next step

frames.uiState: FastAgent panel opens with demo conversation or real agent response, thinking animation plays
frames.userEmotion: Engagement — the system is working with me
frames.requiredData: Agent thread, conversation messages, tool calls
frames.transitionTrigger: Conversation completes or user navigates to Workspace

frames.uiState: Result is saved, episode recorded, founder episode panel shows span timeline, Workspace tab pulses with new data
frames.userEmotion: Trust — my work is preserved
frames.keyCopy: Episode completed — saved to your workspace
frames.requiredData: Episode record with spans, packet reference, Convex persistence confirmation
frames.transitionTrigger: User clicks Workspace tab or starts a new search

frames.uiState: Ask surface with input focused, placeholder text suggests company or idea queries
frames.userEmotion: Purposeful — I have a specific company or idea to evaluate
frames.requiredData: Input bar, suggestion chips for company search
frames.transitionTrigger: User types a company name or idea description

frames.uiState: Multi-step trace shows entity extraction, web search in progress, sources accumulating
frames.userEmotion: Patience — watching the system work across sources
frames.requiredData: Entity name, source count, active trace steps
frames.transitionTrigger: Extraction completes, results begin rendering

frames.uiState: 9-card company analysis brief renders: overview, market, competitors, risks, financials, team, tech, moat, verdict
frames.userEmotion: Impressed — structured intelligence on demand
frames.requiredData: Structured entity data across 9 dimensions, source citations, confidence per section
frames.transitionTrigger: User clicks a card to expand or switches role lens

frames.uiState: Role lens selector active — banker/founder/investor/researcher views reshape the same data for different decisions
frames.userEmotion: Empowerment — I can see this from multiple angles
frames.requiredData: Role-specific templates, filtered signals per lens, lens-appropriate next steps
frames.transitionTrigger: User clicks 'Save to Packets' or 'Start Decision Memo'

frames.uiState: Packet generated — company brief saved with version hash, visible in Packets surface
frames.userEmotion: Satisfaction — tangible output from research
frames.requiredData: Packet record, version number, content hash, evidence count
frames.transitionTrigger: User navigates to Packets or starts a new query

frames.uiState: Entity added to watchlist suggestion, History shows the analysis episode, Workspace reflects new company context
frames.userEmotion: Ownership — this is building my operating context
frames.keyCopy: Watch [entity]? Changes will appear in your History
frames.requiredData: Watchlist suggestion, episode in history, workspace state updated
frames.transitionTrigger: User accepts watchlist or moves to next task

frames.uiState: Workspace surface with 3 founder loop cards visible. Weekly Reset card highlighted with refresh icon
frames.userEmotion: Ritual — this is my weekly operating rhythm
frames.keyCopy: Weekly Reset — Refresh your operating context, surface contradictions, produce a fresh packet
frames.requiredData: Loop cards rendered, last reset date shown if available
frames.transitionTrigger: User clicks Weekly Reset card

frames.uiState: Agent panel opens, episode starts with 'before' span. System loads prior packet, compares to current state
frames.userEmotion: Anticipation — what changed since last week?
frames.requiredData: Prior packet (if exists), current company state, episode started with stateBeforeHash
frames.transitionTrigger: State comparison completes, contradictions surfaced

frames.uiState: Contradictions panel shows mismatches between prior assumptions and current reality. New signals highlighted
frames.userEmotion: Clarity — I see what drifted
frames.keyCopy: [N] contradictions detected between your last packet and current state
frames.requiredData: Contradiction list with severity, new signals since last reset, drift score
frames.transitionTrigger: User reviews contradictions, marks resolved/acknowledged

frames.uiState: Next 3 moves suggested based on updated context. User can accept, modify, or reject each
frames.userEmotion: Agency — I decide what to prioritize
frames.keyCopy: Suggested next moves based on your updated context
frames.requiredData: Suggested actions ranked by impact, evidence for each suggestion
frames.transitionTrigger: User confirms moves or modifies the list

frames.uiState: Fresh operating packet generated with updated company truth, resolved contradictions, chosen priorities
frames.userEmotion: Accomplishment — my week has a foundation
frames.requiredData: New packet with version, content hash, stateAfterHash, resolved contradictions, chosen moves
frames.transitionTrigger: Packet saved, episode finalized

frames.uiState: Packet visible in Packets surface, episode in History, Workspace shows updated company truth. Optional: share memo
frames.userEmotion: Confidence — I'm operating from current truth
frames.keyCopy: Weekly reset complete. Your workspace is current.
frames.requiredData: Packet in packets list, episode in history, workspace state refreshed
frames.transitionTrigger: User exits to Ask or starts another loop

frames.uiState: Workspace surface, Pre-Delegation card active. Input area for task description or context drop
frames.userEmotion: Purposeful — I need to hand something off to an agent
frames.keyCopy: Pre-Delegation Briefing — Package context for an agent handoff with evidence and guardrails
frames.requiredData: Task description input, prior context available
frames.transitionTrigger: User describes the delegation task or drops context

frames.uiState: System analyzes context, identifies knowledge gaps, checks if sufficient evidence exists for delegation
frames.userEmotion: Concern — is this enough context for the agent?
frames.requiredData: Context completeness score, evidence inventory, knowledge gaps identified
frames.transitionTrigger: Readiness assessment completes

frames.uiState: Delegation readiness card shows: context score, missing evidence, guardrails needed, recommended agent capabilities
frames.userEmotion: Understanding — I see what the agent needs
frames.requiredData: Readiness score, gap list, guardrail suggestions, capability requirements
frames.transitionTrigger: User resolves gaps or accepts current readiness level

frames.uiState: Permission configuration: what can the agent do, what requires approval, what's blocked. Explicit guardrails
frames.userEmotion: Control — I set the boundaries
frames.requiredData: Permission modes (auto_allowed, ask_first, manual_only), capability list
frames.transitionTrigger: User confirms permissions and delegates

frames.uiState: Delegation packet generated: task definition, context bundle, permissions, evidence attachments, guardrails
frames.userEmotion: Relief — it's packaged and ready
frames.keyCopy: Delegation packet created — ready for agent handoff
frames.requiredData: founderTaskPacket record with instructions, permissions, evidence IDs, return format
frames.transitionTrigger: Packet dispatched to agent or saved for later

frames.uiState: Delegation visible in Packets surface with status tracking, History shows the handoff episode, agent presence indicator active
frames.userEmotion: Trust — I can track what happens next
frames.keyCopy: Agent [name] received your delegation. Track progress in Packets.
frames.requiredData: Task status, agent acknowledgment, packet in lineage, episode in history
frames.transitionTrigger: User monitors via Packets or starts next task

frames.uiState: History surface, Important Changes tab active. Change cards sorted by severity with timestamps
frames.userEmotion: Alertness — what happened while I was away?
frames.keyCopy: [N] important changes detected since [last session date]
frames.requiredData: founderImportantChanges records, severity levels, affected entities
frames.transitionTrigger: User clicks a change card to inspect

frames.uiState: Before/after state diff for the selected change. Shows what was true before vs what's true now
frames.userEmotion: Concern — how does this affect my current plans?
frames.requiredData: founderStateDiffs record, prior packet state, current state, affected packets identified
frames.transitionTrigger: User assesses impact, system shows affected packets

frames.uiState: Affected packets listed with staleness indicators. Contradictions between change and existing packet content highlighted
frames.userEmotion: Clarity — I see the downstream effects
frames.keyCopy: [N] packets may be stale due to this change
frames.requiredData: Stale packet list, contradiction details, refresh recommendations
frames.transitionTrigger: User decides to refresh, dismiss, or investigate further

frames.uiState: Action panel: Refresh affected packets, Dismiss (acknowledged), Investigate (deep dive), Delegate (hand to agent)
frames.userEmotion: Decisiveness — I know what to do about this
frames.keyCopy: What would you like to do about this change?
frames.requiredData: Action options with estimated effort, refresh preview
frames.transitionTrigger: User selects an action

frames.uiState: Updated packet generated (if refresh), or change marked resolved with rationale, or delegation packet created
frames.userEmotion: Resolution — this is handled
frames.requiredData: Resolution record, updated packet (if refreshed), episode span recording the decision
frames.transitionTrigger: Resolution saved, next change auto-focused

frames.uiState: Change count decremented, resolved changes move to History, refreshed packets visible in Packets, overall operating context updated
frames.userEmotion: Progress — working through the queue
frames.keyCopy: [N] remaining changes. Your context is [X]% current.
frames.requiredData: Remaining changes count, currentness score, history audit trail
frames.transitionTrigger: User proceeds to next change or exits to Workspace

frames.uiState: Ask surface with comparison query entered (e.g. 'Anthropic vs OpenAI')
frames.userEmotion: Strategic — need competitive intelligence
frames.requiredData: Multi-entity query parsed, entity names extracted
frames.transitionTrigger: Search initiated

frames.uiState: Parallel search traces for each entity, sources accumulating for both
frames.userEmotion: Patience — multi-entity searches take longer
frames.requiredData: Per-entity trace steps, source counts per entity
frames.transitionTrigger: Both entity extractions complete

frames.uiState: Side-by-side comparison view: strengths, weaknesses, market position, funding, team size, tech stack for each entity
frames.userEmotion: Insight — structured comparison I couldn't build manually
frames.requiredData: Structured comparison data per entity, overlapping and differentiating signals
frames.transitionTrigger: User clicks to drill into a specific dimension

frames.uiState: Strategic implications panel: where you win, where you lose, blind spots, opportunities
frames.userEmotion: Actionable clarity — I know my competitive position
frames.requiredData: Competitive position analysis, own company context (if available), gap identification
frames.transitionTrigger: User saves comparison or starts a decision memo

frames.uiState: Competitive analysis packet saved with both entity profiles, comparison matrix, strategic recommendations
frames.userEmotion: Prepared — I have the intel for my next meeting
frames.requiredData: Multi-entity packet, comparison matrix, strategic recommendations
frames.transitionTrigger: Navigate to Packets or start new research

frames.uiState: Both entities added to watchlist suggestions, History records the competitive analysis episode
frames.userEmotion: Ongoing — I'll be notified if the landscape shifts
frames.keyCopy: Watch these competitors? Changes will surface in History
frames.requiredData: Watchlist suggestions for both entities, episode saved
frames.transitionTrigger: Accept watchlist or exit

frames.uiState: History surface, Prior Episodes tab active. Timeline of founder episodes with status badges
frames.userEmotion: Reflective — what's my operating trajectory?
frames.requiredData: founderHarnessEpisodes list, episode types, timestamps, statuses
frames.transitionTrigger: User clicks an episode to expand

frames.uiState: Episode detail expands: span timeline, tools invoked, artifacts produced, state before/after
frames.userEmotion: Curiosity — what happened in this session?
frames.requiredData: Episode spans, tool list, artifact list, state hashes
frames.transitionTrigger: User compares with another episode or checks drift

frames.uiState: Trajectory view: progression score over time, consistency index, contradiction trend, key inflection points marked
frames.userEmotion: Self-awareness — I can see my decision patterns
frames.requiredData: Trajectory scores, consistency metrics, inflection events
frames.transitionTrigger: User identifies a pattern or concern

frames.uiState: Recommendations based on trajectory: what to double down on, what to reconsider, where you're drifting
frames.userEmotion: Strategic clarity — data-driven self-correction
frames.requiredData: Trajectory-derived recommendations, supporting evidence from episodes
frames.transitionTrigger: User acts on a recommendation or acknowledges

frames.uiState: Trajectory report exportable as memo, with key episodes cited and recommendations documented
frames.userEmotion: Accountability — documented for my board or team
frames.requiredData: Report template, cited episodes, trajectory scores, recommendations
frames.transitionTrigger: Export or save

frames.uiState: Trajectory baseline updated, next session will compare against this checkpoint
frames.userEmotion: Progress — building a track record
frames.keyCopy: Trajectory checkpoint saved. Next session will compare from here.
frames.requiredData: Checkpoint state hash, baseline metrics
frames.transitionTrigger: User exits to Workspace or Ask

frames.uiState: Packets surface with active packet card, lineage timeline, export section. Packet version history visible
frames.userEmotion: Productive — I need to share or use my packet
frames.requiredData: Current packet, version number, content hash, last modified date
frames.transitionTrigger: User clicks export or selects a prior version

frames.uiState: Export format selector: Slack 1-pager, investor memo, banker readiness, PDF, markdown, shared URL
frames.userEmotion: Choice — which format fits my audience?
frames.requiredData: Available export formats, packet content preview per format
frames.transitionTrigger: User selects a format

frames.uiState: Export preview renders the packet in the selected format. User can see exactly what the recipient will see
frames.userEmotion: Confidence — I can verify before sharing
frames.requiredData: Rendered export in selected format, metadata (evidence count, sources, confidence)
frames.transitionTrigger: User confirms export or adjusts

frames.uiState: Share configuration: recipient, permissions (view/comment/edit), expiration, watermark options
frames.userEmotion: Control — I decide who sees what
frames.requiredData: Share options, recipient input, permission levels
frames.transitionTrigger: User confirms sharing

frames.uiState: Export generated: shareable URL or downloaded file. Copy-to-clipboard feedback with confirmation
frames.userEmotion: Accomplishment — deliverable ready
frames.requiredData: Export URL or file, share confirmation, audit trail entry
frames.transitionTrigger: User copies URL or downloads

frames.uiState: Export logged in packet lineage. History shows the export event. Packet version preserved for future reference
frames.userEmotion: Traceable — I know what I shared and when
frames.requiredData: Export event in founderEventLedger, lineage entry, version preserved
frames.transitionTrigger: User returns to Packets or starts new work

frames.uiState: Connect surface with MCP quick start command, connection status cards (MCP Server, Watchlists, Agents)
frames.userEmotion: Setup — I want to wire this into my workflow
frames.requiredData: Install command, connection status per integration
frames.transitionTrigger: User copies install command or clicks a connection card

frames.uiState: Connection verification in progress. Testing MCP handshake, tool count, preset validation
frames.userEmotion: Uncertainty — will this work with my setup?
frames.requiredData: Connection test status, tool count verification, preset match
frames.transitionTrigger: Connection verified or error surfaced

frames.uiState: Connection confirmed: 304 tools available, founder preset active, workspace sync ready. Or: error with actionable fix
frames.userEmotion: Relief or frustration — clear either way
frames.requiredData: Tool count, active preset, sync status, or error details with fix instructions
frames.transitionTrigger: User proceeds to workspace sync or watchlist setup

frames.uiState: Configuration panel: workspace sync frequency, watchlist entities, agent registration, notification preferences
frames.userEmotion: Customization — making it mine
frames.requiredData: Config options, current settings, recommendations
frames.transitionTrigger: User saves configuration

frames.uiState: Integration configured and tested. First sync completes, workspace populated with initial context
frames.userEmotion: Satisfaction — it's live and working
frames.requiredData: Sync confirmation, initial context summary, next sync scheduled
frames.transitionTrigger: User navigates to Workspace to see synced data

frames.uiState: Connection health dashboard: last sync, tool usage, error rate. Ambient monitoring active
frames.userEmotion: Confidence — it's working in the background
frames.requiredData: Connection health metrics, sync history, error log
frames.transitionTrigger: User exits to Ask or Workspace

frames.uiState: Connect surface, Watchlists section. Entity cards with monitoring status, alert counts, last checked timestamps
frames.userEmotion: Oversight — what am I tracking?
frames.requiredData: Watchlist entries with entity names, alert counts, last checked dates
frames.transitionTrigger: User clicks an entity card or 'Add entity' button

frames.uiState: Alert summary for a watched entity: [N] new signals since last check, [M] severity breakdown
frames.userEmotion: Alertness — something may need attention
frames.requiredData: Alert list, severity levels, signal timestamps, source references
frames.transitionTrigger: User clicks an alert to investigate

frames.uiState: Signal detail: what changed, evidence sources, relevance to your company, recommended action
frames.userEmotion: Informed — I understand the signal
frames.requiredData: Signal detail, source URLs, relevance score, action recommendation
frames.transitionTrigger: User decides to act, dismiss, or investigate further

frames.uiState: Action menu: Investigate (deep search), Note (add context), Dismiss (acknowledge), Escalate (create important change)
frames.userEmotion: Decisive — triaging my monitoring feed
frames.keyCopy: How should we handle this signal?
frames.requiredData: Action options, signal context, affected packets
frames.transitionTrigger: User selects an action

frames.uiState: Action recorded: investigation started, note saved, signal dismissed with reason, or important change created in History
frames.userEmotion: Processed — signal is handled
frames.requiredData: Action record, updated alert count, affected packet notification (if any)
frames.transitionTrigger: Next alert auto-focused or user exits

frames.uiState: Alert count updated, monitoring continues, History shows triage decisions, Workspace reflects any new important changes
frames.userEmotion: Ambient confidence — I'm on top of my landscape
frames.requiredData: Updated watchlist state, monitoring health, next check schedule
frames.transitionTrigger: User exits to Workspace or Ask
